content.situation: 同事在会议结束后感谢你提供的建议，你希望礼貌结束对话并表示愿意继续提供支持
content.speakerText: Thanks for the great advice today!

blanks.answer: Feel free to reach out if you need more help.
options: Feel free to reach out if you need more help.
I'm busy now, so don't bother me.
That's okay, I didn't do much.

content.hint: 用开放式的支持性表达收尾，强调愿意继续协助
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌结束对话并表达后续支持

content.situation: 朋友在咖啡店告别时感谢你陪她聊天，你希望表达开心见面并期待下次联系
content.speakerText: I really enjoyed our chat today!
content.speakerTextCn: 我今天真的很享受我们的聊天！

options: I have to go to work now.

content.hint: 用积极期待的表达强化人际关系，避免冷淡收尾
content.knowledgePoint: 表达期待后续互动的友好道别

content.situation: 客户在电话结束前感谢你的专业服务，你希望礼貌结束并确认后续跟进
content.speakerText: I appreciate your help with this!
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你对这件事的帮助！

blanks.answer: I'll follow up with you in a few days.
options: I'll follow up with you in a few days.
I'm done now, so that's it.
You're welcome, but I'm not sure if it helped.

content.hint: 用承诺后续行动的表达增强信任感，而非简单道别
content.knowledgePoint: 专业场景中承诺后续跟进的道别方式
